column1: Background: The Pureblood is a proud-arrogant noble
column2: descended from an ancient lineage untouched by magical corruption. Arrogant and elitist
column3: they believe in their inherent superiority and will stop at nothing to protect their legacy.

column1: Weapon of Choice: Ancestral Spear – A finely crafted spear passed down through generations
Noble Strike (Regular): A powerful thrust that ignores 25% of the enemy's armor.

column2: 2-turn reload): Increases Pureblood’s Strength and Agility by 4 for the next 3 turns
column3: at the cost of reducing Defense by 2.

column1: Unyielding Heritage (Unique Circumstance - Facing a family rival): When facing an enemy who shares blood or history
column2: Pureblood's attack power increases by 50% for the duration of the battle.

column1: The Pureblood's noble heritage grants them resistance to status effects like charm and fear. They gain an advantage on saving throws against such conditions and can inspire nearby allies
column2: increasing their resistance to charm by 50%.
the Wendigo was transformed into a monstrous creature after resorting to cannibalism in a cursed forest. Now
column4: driven by an insatiable hunger for flesh and the torment of its former humanity.

column1: Weapon of Choice: Claws of Hunger – The Wendigo’s razor-sharp claws can rend through flesh and armor alike.
Ravenous Bite (Regular): Deals a ferocious bite to the enemy

column2: 2-turn reload): Lets out a terrifying howl that reduces the defense and agility of all enemies for 3 turns.

column1: Flesh Frenzy (Unique Circumstance - In a snowstorm or freezing environment): The Wendigo enters a frenzy
column2: gaining double attack speed for 3 turns in cold environments.
